dublinCore.dc:title: HR 1520 ENR: Further Extension of Continuing Appropriations Act, 2021
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.congress: One Hundred Sixteenth Congress of the United States of America
form.enrolled-dateline: Begun and held at the City of Washington on Friday, the third day of January, two thousand and twenty
form.official-title: Making further continuing appropriations for fiscal year 2021, and for other purposes.

section.text: That the Continuing Appropriations Act, 2021 (division A of Public Law 116–159) is further amended by striking the date specified in section 106(3) and inserting December 28, 2020.
This Act may be cited as the Further Extension of Continuing Appropriations Act, 2021.

attestation-group.role: Speaker of the House of Representatives.
Vice President of the United States and President of the Senate.
